role: President, Islamic Azad University; theoretical physicist; killed June 2025
bio: Mohammad Mehdi Tehranchi was a theoretical physicist who served as President of [Islamic Azad University](/orgs/islamic-azad-university), Iran's largest university system with over 400 branches nationwide. He was killed on 13 June 2025 in the opening Israeli airstrike of [Operation Rising Lion](/events/israeli-strikes-iran-june-2025), which targeted military and nuclear infrastructure across Iran.
editorial_notes: President of Islamic Azad University. Theoretical physicist. Killed in opening Israeli strike 13 June 2025.
